Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 4, 149 [Šumma sinništu qaqqada rabât 4][via cams/gkab]

[...] x [...]

(o i 1') [...] ... [...]

o i 2'2'

[...] I [...]

(o i 2') [...] ... [...]

o i 3'3'

[...] ⸢aš⸣-bat [...]

(o i 3') [...] she lives [...].

o i 4'4'

[...] E₂ aš-bat ŠA₃ ⸢DU₁₀⸣.[GA ...]

(o i 4') [...]: the household in which she lives [...] satisfaction.

o i 5'5'

[...] ⸢E₂⸣ aš-bat ul ⸢ul⸣-[tab-bar]

(o i 5') [...]: the household in which she lives will not last long.

o i 6'6'

[...] ⸢E₂⸣ aš-bat ⸢ul⸣-[tab-bar]

(o i 6') [...]: the household in which she lives will last long.

o i 7'7'

[...] E₂ KU₄bu [...] x

(o i 7') [...]: the household which she enters [...] ....

o i 8'8'

[...] E₂ KU₄bu ⸢SUMUN⸣bar

(o i 8') [...]: the household which she enters will last long.

o i 9'9'

[...]-MEŠ E₂ u u₂-na-ti x DU

(o i 9') [...] ... of the household and furnishings will ....

o i 10'10'

[...]-x-lu-ti ma-la-a E₂ aš-bat ŠA₃-BI DU₁₀.GA SIG₅ IGI

(o i 10') [...] is covered in ...: the household in which she lives will be satisfied; it will experience prosperity.

o i 11'11'

[...] x-MEŠ SA₅-MEŠ E₂ aš-bat ŠA₃-<<BI>> DU₁₀.GA GAR-ši

(o i 11') [...] is covered in ...: the household in which she lives - satisfaction will be established for it.

o i 12'12'

[...] x-MEŠ MUNUS BI na-a-a-kat₂-ma UR₅ ER₂

(o i 12') [...] ...: that woman will be promiscuous; she will weep.

o i 13'13'

[...] x-MEŠ KI.MIN NINDA i-šeb-be KA ŠUB-ši

(o i 13') [...] ... ditto: she will be full of food; a command will be issued for her.

o i 14'14'

[...] x-MEŠ MUNUS BI ne₂-me-la IGI

(o i 14') [...] ...: that woman will experience a profit.

o i 15'15'

[...] x-MEŠ MUNUS BI UKU₂

(o i 15') [...] ...: that woman will become poor.

o i 16'16'

[...] x-MEŠ MUNUS BI UŠ₂ gišTUKUL UŠ₂

(o i 16') [...] ...: that woman will die a violent death.

o i 17'17'

[...] x ⸢KI⸣.MIN MUNUS BI ne₂-me-la IGI

(o i 17') [...] ... ditto: that woman will experience a profit.

o i 18'18'

[...] SA₅at ana E₂ la₃ DU₁₀ ŠA₃ KU₄ub

(o i 18') [...] is covered in [...]: she will enter a dissatisfied household.

o i 19'19'

[...] SA₅at MUNUS BI ne₂-me-la IGI i-šar₂-ru₃

(o i 19') [...] is covered in [...]: that woman will experience a profit; she will become rich.

o i 20'20'

[...] SA₅at MUNUS BI UKU₂

(o i 20') [...] is covered in [...]: that woman will become poor.

o i 21'21'

[...] SA₅at E₂ KU₄ UKU₂

(o i 21') [...] is covered in [...]: the household she enters will become poor.

o i 22'22'

[...] SA₅at ana E₂ ŠA₃-<<BI>> DU₁₀.GA KU₄

(o i 22') [...] is covered in [...]: she will enter a satisfied household.

o i 23'23'

[...] SA₅at NINDA GU₇ u₂-ṣa-am-ma

(o i 23') [...] is covered in [...]: she will eat bread; she will become thirsty.

o i 24'24'

[...] SA₅at E₂ KU₄ ŠA₃-BI DU₁₀.GA

(o i 24') [...] is covered in [...]: the household she enters will become satisfied.

o i 25'25'

[...] SA₅at E₂ aš-bat UKU₂

(o i 25') [...] is covered in [...]: the household in which she lives will become poor.

o i 26'26'

[...] SA₅at E₂ aš-bat it-ta-na-aš-ši

(o i 26') [...] is covered in [...]: she will support the household in which she lives.

o i 27'27'

[...] E₂ aš-bat UKU₂ al-ma-nu-tu₂ DUak

(o i 27') [...]: the household in which she lives will become poor; she will become a widow.

o i 28'28'

[...] x SA₅ E₂ aš-bat UKU₂

(o i 28') [...] is covered in ...: the household in which she lives will become poor.

o i 29'29'

[...] x-i SA₅ NINDA GU₇ i-na-an-di-ši

(o i 29') [...] is covered in ...: she will eat bread; she will vomit it.

o i 30'30'

[...] x-i GE₆-MEŠ SA₅ ŠA₃.ḪUL TUKUši

(o i 30') [...] is covered in black ...: she will experience sorrow.

o i 31'31'

[...] x SA₅-MEŠ SA₅ E₂ aš-bat ŠA₃-BI DU₁₀.GA

(o i 31') [...] is covered in red ...: the household in which she lives will become satisfied.

o i 32'32'

[*] ⸢pa⸣-ni-šu₂ ur-ru-pa E₂ KU₄bu u₂-lap-pan

(o i 32') (If) her face is darkened: she will impoverish the household that she enters.

o i 33'33'

[... ur]-ru-pa ŠU.BI.AŠ.AM₃<(E₂)> KU₄bu u₂-lap-pan

(o i 33') [...] is darkened: ditto (she will impoverish the household that she enters).

o i 34'34'

[... ur]-ru-pa E₂ aš-bat UKU₂

(o i 34') [...] is darkened: the household in which she lives will become poor.

o i 35'35'

[... ur]-ru-pa E₂ aš-bat BIRaḫ

(o i 35') [...] is darkened: the household in which she lives will be scattered.

o i 36'36'

[...] x RA MUNUS BI NIG₂.TUK IGI

(o i 36') [...] ...: that woman will experience riches.

o i 37'37'

[...] U₂ : la-lu-u₂ MUNUS BI NINDA sad-ra GU₇

(o i 37') [...] ... (or): plenty; that woman will regularly eat bread.

o i 38'38'

[... ub]-bu-lu MUNUS BI UKU₂

(o i 38') [...] are dried out: that woman will become poor.

o i 39'39'

[...] x-MEŠ E₂ KU₄bu BIRaḫ

(o i 39') [...] ...: the household that she enters will be scattered.

o i 40'40'

[...]-MEŠ muš-tam-ri-ṣa-at : mu-še-zi-qat

(o i 40') [...] ...: she is one who is constantly ill (or): she is a troublemaker.

o i 41'41'

[...] x-na-at al-ma-nu-tu₂ DUak

(o i 41') [...] she is a ...; she will become a widow.

o i 42'42'

[...] ŠA₃-<<BI>> DU₁₀.GA GAR-ši

(o i 42') [...]: satisfaction will be established for her.

o i 43'43'

[...] E₂ aš-bat u₂-ḫal-laq

(o i 43') [...]: she will destroy the household in which she lives.

o i 44'44'

[...] E₂ aš-bat SIG₅

(o i 44') [...]: the household in which she lives will prosper.

o i 45'45'

[...] in-na-ak u E₃

(o i 45') [...] will have sexual intercourse with (her) and expel (her).

o i 46'46'

[...] ŠU.BI.AŠ.AM₃<(in-na-ak)> u E₃

(o i 46') [...] ditto ([...] will have sexual intercourse with (her) and expel (her)).

o i 47'47'

[...] te-bu-u₂ ina-ak u E₃

(o i 47') [...]: an aggressor will have sexual intercourse with (her) and expel (her).

o i 48'48'

[... te-bu]-u₂ ina-ak u u₂-še-ṣi

(o i 48') [...]: an aggressor will have sexual intercourse with (her) and expel (her).

o i 49'49'

[...] ek-liš!(MAN) DU-MEŠ

(o i 49') [...]: she will go around gloomily.

o i 50'50'

[...] nam-riš DU-MEŠ

(o i 50') [...]: she will go around brightly.

o i 51'51'

[...] UKU₂ im-ṭu₂-u₂ GAR-ši

(o i 51') [...] she will become poor; losses will be established for her.

o i 52'52'

[...] DINGIRna-at

(o i 52') [...] she is favoured by the gods.

o i 53'53'

[...] DINGIRna-at

(o i 53') [...] she is favoured by the gods.

o i 54'54'

[...] * DAGALat i-šar₂-ru₃

(o i 54') [...]. (If) it is wide: she will become rich.

o ii 1'o 1'

* [...]

(o ii 1') (If) [...].

o ii 2'2'

* ma-[aʾ-da ...]

(o ii 2') (If) (the lines on her hands) are numerous: [...].

o ii 3'3'

* GAL[a ...]

(o ii 3') (If) they are large: [...].

o ii 4'4'

* kur-⸢ra⸣-[a ...]

(o ii 4') (If) they are very short: [...].

o ii 5'5'

* ma-gal [...]

(o ii 5') (If) they are greatly [...].

o ii 6'6'

* ša₂ ZA₃ pe-[ta-a ...]

(o ii 6') (If) those of the right are open [...].

o ii 7'7'

* ša₂ GUB₃ pe-ta-[a ...]

(o ii 7') (If) those of the left are open [...].

o ii 8'8'

* ⸢ZA₃⸣ u GUB₃ pe-ta-⸢a⸣ [...]

(o ii 8') (If) they are open on the right and on the left: [...].

o ii 9'9'

* ⸢KUR₂⸣-[MEŠ] SA₅-MEŠ [...] x x x [...]

(o ii 9') (If) they are covered in (lines like) KUR₂ signs (in the form of crosses) [...] ... [...].

o ii 10'10'

* ka-an-ni SA₅-⸢MEŠ TI ur⸣-[rak]

(o ii 10') (If) they are covered in (lines like) bands: she will lengthen (her) life.

o ii 11'11'

* ZA₃ u GUB₃ ed-la SAG.⸢PA⸣.[LAGAB ...]

(o ii 11') (If) they are shut on the right and on the left: wailing [...].

o ii 12'12'

* MUNUS ŠU.SI-MEŠ ŠU-MIN-ša₂ GID₂.DA-MEŠ ŠA₃-⸢BI⸣ [...]

(o ii 12') (If) a woman - the fingers of her hands are long: satisfaction [...].

o ii 13'13'

* GIR₃-MEŠ-ša₂ GID₂.DA-MEŠ ul i-⸢tar⸣-[ra-aṣ ...]

(o ii 13') (If the toes) of her feet are long: she will not succeed; [...].

o ii 14'14'

* ⸢ŠU⸣.SI-MEŠ ŠU-MIN-ša₂ LUGUD₂-MEŠ E₂ [...]

(o ii 14') (If) the fingers of her hand are short: the household [...].

o ii 15'15'

* ŠU.SI-MEŠ GIR₃-MIN-ša₂ LUGUD₂-MEŠ i-⸢tar⸣-ra-aṣ [...]

(o ii 15') (If) the toes of her feet are short: she will succeed; [...].

o ii 16'16'

10* ŠU.SI-MEŠ ŠU-MIN-ša₂ GID₂-MEŠ-ma ŠU.SI-MEŠ GIR₃-MIN-ša₂ LUGUD₂-MEŠ ul ⸢i⸣-[tar-ra-aṣ]  ; a-mat ḪULti₃

(o ii 16') (If) the fingers of her hands are long but the toes of her feet are short: she will not succeed; an evil matter.

o ii 17'17'

* ŠU.SI-MEŠ ŠU-MIN-ša₂ LUGUD₂-ME-ma ŠU.SI-MEŠ GIR₃-MIN-ša₂ GID₂-MEŠ E₂ KU₄bu [...]

(o ii 17') (If) the fingers of her hands are short but the toes of her feet are long: the household she enters [...].

o ii 18'18'

* ŠU.SI-MEŠ ŠU-MIN-ša₂ u GIR₃-MIN-ša₂ mit-ḫa-ra i-šar₂-ru₃ DINGIR ⸢TUKU⸣[ši]

(o ii 18') (If) her fingers and toes (lit. the fingers of her hands and feet) are in proportion: she will become rich; she will acquire a (personal) god.

o ii 19'19'

* ŠU.SI-MEŠ ŠU-MIN-⸢ša₂⸣ šu!-um-mu-ṭa kaš-ša₂-pat KI.MIN ina-an-⸢ziq⸣  ; sa-ab-ba-sa-⸢at⸣

(o ii 19') (If) the fingers of her hands are very flat: she is a sorceress; alternatively, she will worry; she will be very angry.

o ii 20'20'

* ŠU.SI-MEŠ ŠU-MIN-ša₂ x [...] ⸢ša₂⸣-al-la-ṭa-at KI.MIN ba-aṣ-[...]

(o ii 20') (If) the fingers of her hands ... [...]: she is very authoritative; alternatively ... [...].

o ii 21'21'

* ŠU.SI-MEŠ ŠU-MIN-ša₂ GAL-MEŠ : LUGUD₂-MEŠ TIL u₄-⸢mi⸣

(o ii 21') (If) the fingers of her hands are large (or): short: end of days.

o ii 22'22'

* ba-aʾ-la li-pit ŠU-MIN-ša₂ NU SI.SA₂

(o ii 22') (If) they are exceptionally large: her handiwork will not succeed.

o ii 23'23'

* TUR-MEŠ li-pit ŠU-MIN-ša₂ SI.SA₂

(o ii 23') (If) they are small: her handiwork will succeed.

o ii 24'24'

* kab-ba-ra kaš-ša₂-pat

(o ii 24') (If) they are very thick: she is a sorceress.

o ii 25'25'

* SIG-MEŠ muš-tam-ri-ṣa-at

(o ii 25') (If) they are thin: she is one who is constantly ill.

o ii 26'26'

10* MUNUS SAG ŠU.SI-MEŠ-šu₂ kab-ba-ra kaš-ša₂-pat

(o ii 26') (If) a woman - the tips of her (lit. his) fingers are very thick: she is a sorceress.

o ii 27'27'

* SA-MEŠ ŠU-MIN-ša₂ pur-ru-ku E₂ KU₄bu u₂-lap-pan

(o ii 27') (If) the veins of her hands are lying across (them visibly): she will impoverish the household she enters.

o ii 28'28'

* UMBIN ŠU.SI-ME ŠU-MIN-ša₂ ur-ru-ra : kab-ba-ra LU₃.LU₃aḫ  ; al-ma-nu-tu₂ DUak

(o ii 28') (If) the fingernails of her hands are deeply incised (or): very thick: she will become constantly confused; she will become a widow.

o ii 29'29'

* ši-li SA₅-MEŠ al-ma-nu-tu₂ DUak

(o ii 29') (If) they are covered in depressions: she will become a widow.

o ii 30'30'

* BABBAR tuk-ku-pa mu-lap-pi-na-at

(o ii 30') (If) they are spotted with white: she is one who impoverishes.

o ii 31'31'

* kut-tu₃-ma ŠU.BI.AŠ.AM₃<(mu-lap-pi-na-at)>

(o ii 31') (If) they are : ditto (she is one who impoverishes).

o ii 32'32'

* ḫu-up-pa-a al-ma-nu-tu₂ DUak

(o ii 32') (If) they are broken: she will become a widow.

o ii 33'33'

* tur-ru-pa mu-lap-pi-[na-at]

(o ii 33') (If) they are discoloured: she is one who impoverishes.

o ii 34'34'

* um-ṣa-a-ti SA₅-MEŠ ⸢al⸣-ma-nu-tu₂ <DUak> : mu-lap-⸢pi⸣-[na-at]

(o ii 34') (If) they are covered in moles: she will become a widow; she is one who impoverishes.

o ii 35'35'

* LIL₂ UMBIN ⸢TUKU⸣ DINGIRna-[at]

(o ii 35') (If) she has diseased nails: she is favoured by the gods.

o ii 36'36'

10* MUNUS GABA DAGAL ba-⸢a-a⸣-lat i-šar₂-ru₃ DINGIRna-[at]

(o ii 36') (If) a woman - (her) chest is wide (or) exceptionally large: she will become rich; she is favoured by the gods.

o ii 37'37'

* si-qat mu-uš!-ta-aš-pi-ta-at na-a-[a-kat₂]

(o ii 37') (If) it is narrow: she is self-deceiving; she is promiscuous.

o ii 38'38'

* nu-up-pu-šat ba-a-a-lat i-šar₂-[ru₃]

(o ii 38') (If) it is very wide (or) exceptionally large: she will become rich.

o ii 39'39'

* ḫu-ub-bu-šat mar-ra-[ṣa?-at?]

(o ii 39') (If) it is swollen: she will be very sickly.

o ii 40'40'

* ⸢MUNUS⸣ [x] x bi-bi-tu₂ i-šu DINGIRna-at

(o ii 40') (If) a woman: [...] ... has bibītu-disease: she is favoured by the gods.

o ii 41'41'

* [ina] SAG.DU MAŠ.SILA₃-ša₂ ša₂ ZA₃ SAMAG GARat UL [...]

(o ii 41') (If) a mole is located [on] the top of her right shoulder-blade: ... [...].

o ii 42'42'

* GUB₃ KI.MIN<(SAMAG)> GARat [...]

(o ii 42') (If) ditto (a mole is located) on the left: [...]

o ii 43'43'

* [ina] ⸢EDIN⸣ MAŠ.SILA₃-ša₂ SAMAG GARat um-ma-az-za-[aʾ]

(o ii 43') (If) a mole is located [on] the back of her shoulder-blade: she will be raped.

o ii 44'44'

* MURU₂-ME-ša₂ um-ṣa-a-ti šu-us₂-ḫu-ra [...]

(o ii 44') (If) her waist is encircled by moles: [...].

Reverse
Column i
r i 1r i 1

[*] GIŠ.KUN pa-as-lat DINGIR[na-at]

(r i 1) (If her) pelvis is twisted: she is favoured by the gods.

r i 22

[*] MUNUS ḫu-ur-da-tu₂ DAGALšat [...]

(r i 2) (If) a woman - (her) vulva is wide: [...].

r i 33

[*] MURU₂-MEŠ-ša₂ gap-ša₂ ina-[an?-ziq?]

(r i 3) (If) her hips are swollen: she will worry.

r i 44

[*] MURU₂-MEŠ-ša₂ še-eb-ra KU ša₂-niš ne₂-[me-la ...]

(r i 4) (If) her hips are broken: [...] ..., alternatively, profit.

r i 55

[*] MUNUS UBUR-MEŠ-ša₂ ba-aʾ-la DINGIR[na-at]

(r i 5) (If) a woman - her breasts are exceptionally large: she is favoured by the gods.

r i 66

[*] TUR-MEŠ im-ṭu₂-u₂ GARnu-ši :. * ma-aq-ta [...]

(r i 6) (If) they are small: losses will be established for her. : (If) they are drooping: [...]

r i 77

[*] zaq-pu NU a-li-da-at :. * KI GABA-šu₂ šam-⸢ṭa⸣ [...]

(r i 7) (If) they are upright: she is not fertile. : (If) they are flattened against her (lit. his) chest: [...].

r i 88

* MUNUS UBUR ša₂ 15 GID₂ NU MIN<(a-li-da-at)> :. * ša₂ GUB₃ GID₂ U₃.[TU]

(r i 8) (If) a woman - (her) right breast is long: she is not fertile. : (If) that of the left is long: she will give birth.

r i 99

10* MUNUS KIR₄ UBUR-ša₂ BABBAR-MEŠ mu-šal-li-[mat]

(r i 9) (If) a woman - her nipples are white: she is one who gives birth safely.

r i 1010

* SIG₇-MEŠ NU MIN<(mu-šal-li-mat)> :. * GE₆-MEŠ NU MIN<(mu-šal-li-mat)> :. * da-aʾ-mu [...]

(r i 10) (If) they are pale: she is not ditto (one who gives birth safely.) : (If) they are black: she is not ditto (one who gives birth safely). : (If) they are dark: [...].

r i 1111

* GE₆ u da-aʾ-mu ul i-tar-ra-aṣ ŠA₃.⸢ḪUL⸣

(r i 11) (If) they are black or dark: she will not succeed; sorrow.

r i 1212

* TUR-MEŠ ul u₂-šal-⸢lam⸣

(r i 12) (If) they are small: she will not give birth safely.

r i 1313

* ṣa-pi-ir NU mu-šal-li-mat :. * SAMAG-MEŠ SA₅ NU [...]

(r i 13) (If) they are (lit. it is) inverted: she is not one who gives birth safely. : (If) it is covered in moles: she is not [...].

r i 1414

* du-uʾ-u₂-mu ŠA₃.ḪUL TUKU GENNA al-da-[at]

(r i 14) (If) they are very dark: she will experience sorrow; a baby will be born.

r i 1515

* MUNUS SA-MEŠ KIR₄ UBUR-ša₂ du-uʾ-u₂-mu ŠA₃.ḪUL TUKU : GENNA [...]

(r i 15) (If) a woman - the veins in her nipples are very dark: she will experience sorrow; a baby [...].

r i 1616

10* MUNUS SAG KIR₄ UBUR nu-up-pu-šat ina la₃ DU₁₀ ŠA₃ DUak

(r i 16) (If) a woman - the tip of (her) nipple is very wide: she will go unsatisfied.

r i 1717

* kab-ba-rat : <kab-ba>-ra mu-lap-pi-na-at :. * SIG-ME DINGIRna-at

(r i 17) (If) it is (or): they are very thick: she is one who impoverishes. If they are narrow: she is favoured by the gods.

r i 1818

* MUNUS ŠA₃-MEŠ-ša₂ i-ṣu i-ša₂-rat al-ma-nu-tu₂ DUak

(r i 18) (If) a woman - her belly is (lit. are) small: she is normal; she will become a widow.

r i 1919

* MUNUS ŠA₃-MEŠ-ša₂ ME TUKU i-ša₂-rat DINGIRna-at

(r i 19) (If) a woman has a hundred bellies: she is normal; she is favoured by the gods.

r i 2020

* šu-pu-ul-tu₄ TUKU al-ma-nu-tu₂ DUak

(r i 20) (If) she has a šuppultu: she will become a widow.

r i 2121

* NU TUKU DINGIRna-at

(r i 21) (If) she does not have (a šuppultu): she is favoured by the gods.

r i 2222

* kar-ši ŠA₃ i-šat MIN<(DINGIRna-at)> :. * ma-ku-ut ŠA₃ TUKU MIN<(DINGIRna-at)>

(r i 22) (If) she has a stomach of the belly: ditto (she is favoured by the gods). : (If) she has a makūtu of the belly: ditto (she is favoured by the gods).

r i 2323

* MUNUS ina em-ši-ša₂ ša₂ ZA₃ SAMAG GARat EGIR-MEŠ-ša₂ i-lem-mi-na

(r i 23) (If) a woman - a mole is located on the right (side) of her abdomen: her descendants will do evil.

r i 2424

10* GUB₃ MIN<(SAMAG)> GARat EGIR-MEŠ-ša₂ SIG₅-MEŠ

(r i 24) (If) ditto (it is located) on the left: her descendants will do good.

r i 2525

* MUNUS ina em-ši-ša₂ SIG₂ BABBAR GARat ŠA₃-BI DU₁₀.GA

(r i 25) (If) a woman - a white hair is located on her abdomen: she will be satisfied.

r i 2626

* SIG₂ SA₅ GARat al-ma-nu-tu₂ DUak

(r i 26) (If) a red hair is located (there): she will become a widow.

r i 2727

* SIG₂ GE₆ GARat EGIR-MEŠ-ša₂ ḪUL!?-ME IGI [(x)]

(r i 27) (If) a black hair is located (there): her descendants will experience evil.

r i 2828

* ⸢MUNUS⸣ <ina> ⸢em⸣-ši!(ŠA₂-)ša₂ ana UGU GAL₄.LA GARat AMA U₃.TU [(x)]

(r i 28) (If) it is located on her abdomen above her genitalia: she is a mother; she will give birth.

r i 2929

[*] MUNUS a-bu-un-na-as-sa ḫab-šat ⸢mu-lam⸣-mi-na-[at]

(r i 29) (If) her navel is hard: she is an evil-doer.

r i 3030

[*] MIN<(a-bu-un-na-as-sa)> nar-bat mu-šal-li-mat :. * kaṣ₃-rat [...]

(r i 30) (If) ditto (her navel) is soft: she is one who gives birth safely. : (If) it is knotted: [...].

r i 3131

* ana ZA₃ kap-ṣa-at NU MIN<(mu-šal-li-mat)> :. * ana GUB₃ MIN<(kap-ṣa-at)> mu-⸢šal⸣-[li-mat]

(r i 31) (If) it is distorted to the right: she is not ditto (one who gives birth safely). : (If) ditto (it is distorted) to the left: she is one who gives birth safely.

r i 3232

* šap-lat a-li-[da-at]

(r i 32) (If) it is low: she is fertile.

r i 3333

* ku-up-pu-ta₂-at : ru-up-pu-šat a-li-[da-at]

(r i 33) (If) it is very compact (or): it is very wide: she is fertile.

r i 3434

* ana em-ši-ša₂ šup-pu-lat a-li-[da-at]

(r i 34) (If) it is very deep in her abdomen: she is fertile.

r i 3535

* ana AN.TAnu ša₂-qa₂-at NU [...]

(r i 35) (If) it is high up: she is not [...].

r i 3636

* SAMAG BABBAR GARat MUNUS BI GISKIM-[ša₂ ...]

(r i 36) (If) a white mole is located (there): that woman - her sign [...].

r i 3737

* SAMAG GE₆ GARat MIN<(MUNUS)> BI GISKIM-ša₂ ...

(r i 37) (If) a black mole is located (there): ditto (that woman - her sign [...]).

r i 3838

* i-ta-at a-bu-un-na-ti-ša₂ SAMAG-MEŠ SA₅ SAG.PA.LAGAB [...]

(r i 38) (If) the edges of her navel are covered in moles: wailing [...].

r i 3939

* ina UGU MIN<(a-bu-un-na-ti-ša₂)> SAMAG SA₅ GARat [...]

(r i 39) (If) a red mole is located above ditto (her navel): [...].

r i 4040

* MUNUS pi-ze₂-er-ša₂ GID₂ DINGIR[na-at]

(r i 40) (If) her cobweb is long: she is favoured by the gods.

r i 4141

[*] LUGUD₂.DA ina tam-⸢ṭa⸣-[a-tu₄ ...]

(r i 41) (If) it is short: [...] in penury.

r i 4242

x x x [...] KI [...]

(r i 42) [...] ... [...]

(rest of column missing)
Column ii
r ii 1r ii 1

[...] ⸢DINGIRna-at⸣

(r ii 1) [...]: she is favoured by the gods.

r ii 22

[...]-⸢na⸣-ti

(r ii 2) [...] ....

r ii 33

[... DINGIR]na-⸢at⸣

(r ii 3) [...]: she is favoured by the gods.

r ii 44

[... mu]-⸢lam⸣-mi-na-⸢at⸣

(r ii 4) [...]: she is an evil-doer.

r ii 55

[... ba-aʾ]-⸢la⸣-at DINGIRna-⸢at⸣

(r ii 5) [...] are exceptionally large: she is favoured by the gods.

r ii 66

[* šad]-⸢da⸣ mu-lap-pi-na-⸢at⸣

(r ii 6) (If) they are taut: she is one who impoverishes.

r ii 77

[...]-⸢da⸣-at DINGIRna-at

(r ii 7) [...] ...: she is favoured by the gods.

r ii 88

[...] ⸢na⸣-a-a-kat₂

(r ii 8) [...]: she is promiscuous.

r ii 99

[...] x-ṣa ul u₂-šal-⸢lam⸣

(r ii 9) [...] ...: she will not give birth safely.

r ii 1010

[...] ŠA₃-BI NU DU₁₀.GA SAG.PA.LAGAB sad-rat-si

(r ii 10) [...]: she will not be satisfied; wailing will happen regularly for her.

r ii 1111

[...] ŠA₃-BI DU₁₀.GA

(r ii 11) [...]: she will be satisfied.

r ii 1212

[...] ina-ziq mu-lap-pi-na-at

(r ii 12) [...]: she will worry; she is one who impoverishes.

r ii 1313

[...] lum-mu-na-at

(r ii 13) [...]: she is very evil.

r ii 1414

[...] lum-mu-na-at KI.MIN ep-pe-⸢šet⸣

(r ii 14) [...]: she is very evil; alternatively, she is very clever.

r ii 1515

[...] PEŠ₄at u mu-šal-li-⸢mat⸣

(r ii 15) [...]: she will get pregnant and she will be one who gives birth safely.

r ii 1616

[...] ul ep-pe-šet na-a-a-⸢kat₂⸣

(r ii 16) [...] she is not clever; she is promiscuous.

r ii 1717

[...] GAR DINGIRna-at :. * raq-qa ŠA₃.ḪUL TUKUši

(r ii 17) [...] ...: she is favoured by the gods. : (If) they are thin: she will experience sorrow.

r ii 1818

[...] x-lu E₂ aš-bat BIRaḫ :. * SIG₂ laḫ₃-ma UŠ₂ ar₂-ni UŠ₂

(r ii 18) [...] ...: the household in which she lives will be scattered. : (If her legs) are covered in hairs: she will die a sinful death.

r ii 1919

[*] ⸢pu⸣-un-gu-la ZI.GA TUKU KI.MIN te-ba-[at]

(r ii 19) (If) they are very strong: she will experience loss; alternatively, she is an agressor.

r ii 2020

* pu-us-su-la a-ḫi-is-sa u₂-šam-ṭa :. * pa-as-la a-ṣa-a-at

(r ii 20) (If) they are crippled: her misfortune will diminish. : (If) they are twisted: she is wayward.

r ii 2121

* it-ta-nap-la-as DAM-su DAM NA it-ta-na-a-a-⸢ak⸣

(r ii 21) If she is constantly looked at: her husband will have frequent sexual intercourse with (another) man's wife.

r ii 2222

* pa₄-ḫal-la-na-at ina ki-li i-qat-⸢ti⸣

(r ii 22) (If) she is large-thighed: she will finish (her days) in captivity.

r ii 2323

* MUNUS ŠU.SI-MEŠ GIR₃-MIN-ša₂ GID₂-ME E₂ DU₃ SUMUNbar DINGIRna-⸢at⸣

(r ii 23) (If) a woman - her toes are long: the household she makes will live long; she is favoured by the gods.

r ii 2424

* LUGUD₂-MEŠ ŠA₃-BI DU₁₀.GA :. * kaṣ₃-ṣa ep-pe-šet ina NU ku-šir DU-MEŠ

(r ii 24) (If) they are short: she will be satisfied. : (If) they are trimmed: she is very clever; she will go about unsuccessfully.

r ii 2525

* kut-tu₃-ma ŠA₃.ḪUL IGI :. * kab-ba-ra ŠA₃-BI NU DU₁₀.⸢GA⸣

(r ii 25) (If) they are covered over: she will experience sorrow. : (If) they are very thick: she will not be satisfied.

r ii 2626

* qat-ta-na lum-mu-na-at :. * šam-ṭa UKU₂in

(r ii 26) (If) they are very thin: she is very evil. : (If) they are flattened: she will become poor.

r ii 2727

* UMBIN ŠU.SI-MEŠ GIR₃-MIN-ša₂ ur-ru-ra TIL u₄-mi

(r ii 27) (If) the nails of her toes are deeply incised: end of days.

r ii 2828

* UŠ₂ SA₅-MEŠ ad-di-ra-na-at

(r ii 28) (If) they are covered in blood: she is .....

r ii 2929

* BUR₃-MEŠ SA₅ ad-di-ra-na-at :. * LUGUD₂.DA-MEŠ ŠA₃-BI DU₁₀.⸢GA⸣

(r ii 29) (If) they are covered in depressions: she is .... : (If) they are short: she will be satisfied.

r ii 3030

* kut-tu₃-ma LIL₂!(E₂)LA₂ DABsi ib-ra re-ṣa NU ⸢TUKU⸣

(r ii 30) (If) they are covered over: a lilû-demon will seize her; she will acquire (neither) friend nor helper.

r ii 3131

* du-u₂-ma KI.MIN<(LIL₂.LA₂)> DABsi ib-ra re-ṣa NU TUKU :. * BABBAR-MEŠ la₃ DU₁₀ ŠA₃ TUKUši

(r ii 31) (If) they are very dark: ditto ( a lilû-demon will seize her; she will acquire (neither) friend nor helper). : (If) they are white: she will experience dissatisfaction.

r ii 3232

* GE₆-MEŠ ŠA₃-BI DU₁₀ :. * SA₅-MEŠ LIBIRra :. * SIG₇-MEŠ TIL u₄-⸢mi⸣

(r ii 32) (If) they are black: she will be satisfied. : (If) they are red: she will live long. : (If) they are pale: end of days.

r ii 3333

[*] ⸢pu⸣-tu₂ na-ag-la-at ši-in-ni a-ṣa-at KIR₄ zaq-pat šap-ti qat-ta-[na]

(r ii 33) (If) the chin is glistening, a tooth is protruding, the nose is upright, the lips are very thin, the chin is a point, the hands and feet are covered in hālu-moles and umṣatu-moles: that woman - (her) heart is troubled; she is close to the god; she is radiant; barley and silver are established for her; she will acquire barley and silver; her days will be long; she will not (have to) carry a maššû-basket in front of her.

r ii 3434

su-uq-ti ṣip-rat ŠU-MIN u GIR₃-MIN <<zaq-pat>> ḫa-le-e um-ṣa-a-ti ⸢SA₅⸣

r ii 3535

[(x)] MUNUS BI ŠA₃ ṣa-ap-rat ana DINGIR qer-bet nam-rat ŠE u KU₃.BABBAR GAR-[ši]

r ii 3636

[ŠE] u KU₃.BABBAR ⸢TUKU⸣ši U₄-ME-ša₂ GID₂.DA-MEŠ maš-šu-u₂ ana IGI-ša₂ ul ina-aš-[ši]

r ii 3737

[* pu]-tu₂ i-ša₂-at u šu-me-la ap-pa-šu uš-šu-rat ziq-na i-[šat?]

(r ii 37) (If) she has a (prominent) forehead and on the left her nose is hanging down, she has a beard, [...] ... is thick, her limbs are beautiful: she is a criminal.

r ii 3838

[...] x kab-rat mi-na-a-ti ba-na-at ḫa-ṭa-aʾ-a-at

r ii 3939

[...] im-ni-ša₂ GARin ina da-ba-bi-ša₂ ne₂-ḫa-at

(r ii 39) [...] is located [on] her right side, she is calm in her speech, [...]: that woman - (her) heart is bright; she will go around in joy.

r ii 4040

[...] MUNUS BI ŠA₃ ⸢nam⸣-rat ina ḫi-da-ti DU-MEŠ

r ii 4141

[...] x BE GAR ŠE u KU₃.BABBAR ul i-ḫa-šaḫ

(r ii 41) [...] is located ...: she will not need barley or silver.

r ii 4242

[...] x ZALAG₂ir gišU₃.SUḪ₅ u₂-lab-bar ⸢maš⸣-[šu-u₂ ana IGI]-⸢ša₂⸣ NU IL₂

(r ii 42) [...] ... is bright: the pine-tree will live long; she will not (have to) carry a maššû-basket in front of her.

r ii 4343

[...] NA TUKUši maš-šu-u₂ ana IGI-[ša₂ ... ina-aš]-ši

(r ii 43) [...] she will acquire ...; she will [(not)] (have to) carry a maššû-basket in front of her.

r ii 4444

[...] TAG KUR NA [... TUKU]ši

(r ii 44) [...] ... she will experience [...]

r ii 4545

[...] x ina ku-⸢ri⸣ u SAG.PA.⸢LAGAB⸣ [i-qat]-⸢ti⸣

(r ii 45) [...] ...: she will end (her days) in depression and wailing.

r ii 4646

[...] DA SU [...] x x

(r ii 46) [...] ... [...] ...

(rest of column missing)
